description: Known FHETest.sol handles on sepolia (chainId 11155111). Use for handle parsing and validation tests.

handleFieldsDoc.bytes32Hex: The 32-byte hex handle value as stored on-chain (0x-prefixed)
handleFieldsDoc.fheType: The FHE type name (ebool, euint8, euint16, euint32, euint64, euint128, euint256, eaddress)
handleFieldsDoc.fheTypeId: Numeric FHE type identifier (byte 30 of the handle). 0=ebool, 2=euint8, 3=euint16, 4=euint32, 5=euint64, 6=euint128, 7=eaddress, 8=euint256
handleFieldsDoc.index: Byte 21 of the handle. 255 means computed on-chain, <255 means external (user-encrypted input)
handleFieldsDoc.version: Ciphertext version (byte 31 of the handle). Currently always 0
handleFieldsDoc.isComputed: true if index === 255 (computed on-chain), false if external input
handleFieldsDoc.clearValue: The decrypted plaintext value. String for uint64+ to avoid JSON number precision loss. Only known after decryption
handleFieldsDoc.public: true if the handle has been made publicly decryptable via makePubliclyDecryptable()

rootFieldsDoc.chainId: The numeric chain ID where these handles exist (11155111 = Ethereum Sepolia)
rootFieldsDoc.aclAddress: The FHEVM ACL contract address that governs handle permissions on this chain
rootFieldsDoc.userAddress: The wallet address that has ACL permissions on these handles when they are not public
rootFieldsDoc.contractAddress: The deployed FHETest.sol contract address that owns these handles
